reference: ALL THE PEOPLE THAT I HAD EVER IN MY LIFE REFUSED WERE BROUGHT AGAIN UPON THE STAGE LIKE RICHARD THE THREE S GHOSTS TO REPROACH ME WITHAL AND ALL THE KINDNESS HIS DISCOVERIES COULD MAKE I HAD FOR YOU WAS LAID TO MY CHARGE
text: all the people that i had ever in my life refused were brought again upon the stage like richard the third's ghosts to reproach me with all and all the kindness his discoveries could make i had for you was laid to my charge
